main.description: Download the zstd dictionary used by the /subscribe-v2 websocket's optional compression scheme. The dictionary is requested by its zstd dictionary ID (the same ID embedded in every compressed frame's header); a client that wants compressed frames first fetches the server's current dictionary, then opts in on the websocket with zstdDictionary=<id>. The response is a raw zstd structured dictionary (RFC 8878 section 5), immutable for a given ID and CDN-cacheable. Servers may retire old dictionaries after retraining; a client holding a retired ID re-fetches without an id parameter to obtain the current one.

id.description: The zstd dictionary ID to fetch. Omitted: the server's current dictionary.

errors.name: DictionaryNotFound
errors.description: No dictionary with the given ID is available on this server.
